title: Citrusy Crunchy Show-off Ethiopian Tomato Stir-fry
description: This Citrusy Crunchy Show-off Ethiopian Tomato Stir-fry features pineapple juice and bhuna spices for a unique twist on traditional tomato-based dishes, suitable for jain-friendly diets.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the finely chopped red onion and minced garlic to the heated oil. Sauté until fragrant, about 2 minutes.
Add curry paste and stir-fry for an additional minute, ensuring it does not burn.
Fold in cherry tomatoes and sprinkle with pineapple juice, stirring occasionally.
Reduce heat to medium-low and add bhuna masala powder, red chili powder, and salt. Stir well until evenly distributed.
Continue cooking for about 5-7 minutes or until the sauce thickens slightly and the tomatoes are soft but still retain some bite.
Garnish with fresh cilantro before serving.
